context: Tests whether the agent correctly populates the Landing destination section with the full URL, a page goal alignment statement, and all three required UTM parameters in the correct format (utm_source=<platform>, utm_medium=paid, utm_campaign=<slug>).

checklist.name: Landing destination section present
checklist.description: Brief contains a Landing destination section (not just a URL mentioned in passing elsewhere)

checklist.name: Full URL included
checklist.description: Landing destination section contains a full URL field pointing to the Black Friday landing page (https://techkitmonthly.com/black-friday or the URL from the task)

checklist.name: Page goal alignment field
checklist.description: Landing destination section contains a Page goal alignment field that explains whether and how the landing page supports the campaign offer

checklist.name: utm_source parameter
checklist.description: UTM parameters include utm_source with a platform value (e.g., utm_source=meta or utm_source=facebook)

checklist.name: utm_medium=paid
checklist.description: UTM parameters include utm_medium and its value is 'paid' (not 'cpc', 'social', or another value)

checklist.name: utm_campaign parameter
checklist.description: UTM parameters include utm_campaign with a slug value (e.g., utm_campaign=bf-2026 or equivalent campaign slug)

checklist.name: All three UTM params on same line/block
checklist.description: All three UTM parameters (utm_source, utm_medium, utm_campaign) appear together in the Landing destination section, not scattered elsewhere in the document

checklist.name: Output file saved
checklist.description: Brief is saved to briefs/techkit-bf.md or equivalent vault path

checklist.name: Complete brief structure
checklist.description: Brief contains at least 8 of the required sections (Objective, Audience, Funnel stage, Core message, Hook variants, Copy variants, Asset specs, Landing destination, Tone guardrails, Approval gates)
